programme.title: Empires of New York: 1983-85: Nothing in Their Way

programme.title: Trump: The Billionaire President

programme.title: Young Sheldon: David, Goliath and a Yoo-Hoo From the Back

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: You Don't Know Sponge/ Tunnel of Glove

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: All That Glitters/ Wishing You Well

programme.title: The Loud House: Season's Cheatings/ A Flipmas Carol

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Place for Pets/ Lockdown for Love

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Christian approaches Ana and asks her to give him a second chance. She agrees with one condition: this time, there isn't going to be any rules or punishments. They start to build trust, but figures from Christian's past threaten to tear them apart.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Ana Steel and Christian Grey's fledgling marriage is threatened by jealously when his former lover works her way back into his life, but lurking beyond that is an even greater threat in the form of Ana's disgraced former employer who's out for revenge.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Dressed Up for the Holidays
programme.desc: Ree Drummond celebrates the holidays with extra special seasonal eats. For brunch, there's next-level impressive smoked salmon benedict, elegant creamy mushroom soup that's party perfect and an amped-up side dish of hasselback sweet potatoes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Retro Christmas
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making an array of retro holiday party food that stands the test of time.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Christmas Unwrapped

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Things to Bring

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Best of Barefoot Comfort: One Pot

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like A Pro: Mary Poppins Show

programme.title: Movie: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: A woman is turned into a giant monster when a meteor hits and she is transported to a secret government compound. When aliens attempt to destroy the world, a team of monsters is called into action to save the planet.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Diet

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Menu
programme.desc: The prize jewel on the Secret Joyful Burger menu is a mysterious burger, but to order it you need to know its name. When Larry refuses to tell them what it’s called, they go to super-sized lengths to discover it.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The List
programme.desc: To help their Mom achieve some of her dreams the kids take on her chores, however they accidentally grab her bucket list instead of her chore list.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Uncle
programme.desc: Gumball finds out the Ocho has an uncle named Mario and desperately wants to meet him.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Deal

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Heist
programme.desc: Richard discovers that going into a bank whilst wearing a motorcycle helmet can land you in a lot of trouble.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Line

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Beast Boy's That's What's Up
programme.desc: Beast Boy goes to visit the Doom Patrol. Beast Boy, Negative Girl, and Robotman discover some crabs are up to no good.

programme.title: Roseanne: Mall Story
programme.desc: The Conner family spends the day together at the mall. Unfortunately, family time turns into a disaster when Roseanne and Becky disagree over a party dress, Darlene goes on a junk food binge, and Dan gets in a tight squeeze.

programme.title: Roseanne: Becky's Choice
programme.desc: Roseanne invites Chip and his parents over for a dinner party on the same night Becky has plans with her secret other boyfriend. Chip's family and the Conners come to blows in a battle of the classes.

programme.title: Roseanne: Slice of Life
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan fear the worst when Darlene is rushed to the hospital for an emergency appendectomy.

programme.title: Roseanne: Workin' Overtime
programme.desc: Roseanne's balancing act of motherhood and heavy overtime at work reaches a boiling point. Having been pushed to the edge, Roseanne runs away to a diner.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The 9:04 From Pemberton
programme.desc: Following a fight with Walden, Alan moves in with Herb.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Another Night With Neil Diamond
programme.desc: Alan has trouble coping when Lyndsey dumps him and Walden must find a way to help him get back on his feet.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Bodacious Vidalia
programme.desc: When Walden encourages a depressed Alan to update his look and start dating again, Alan faces a moral dilemma when he attracts a married woman.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Cows, Prepare to Be Tipped
programme.desc: Walden dates a hot 22-year-old but finds himself more interested in her grandmother. Meanwhile, Alan and Jake go on a father-son bonding trip.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Think I Banged Lucille Ball
programme.desc: When Walden feels cramped in his own house, Jenny moves in with Evelyn and her boyfriend, Marty. Meanwhile, Alan becomes Lyndsey's 'other man.'

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: This Unblessed Biscuit
programme.desc: Walden and Alan think it may be time for Berta to retire when she injures her back at work.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Alan Harper, Pleasing Women Since 2003
programme.desc: Alan befriends Lyndsey’s boyfriend in an effort to find out what he has that Alan doesn’t. Meanwhile, Walden helps Jenny be more proactive in pursuing her acting career.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Justice in Star-Spangled Hot Pants
programme.desc: When Alan learns Walden knows Lynda Carter, he asks him to set him up on a date with her. Against his better judgment, Walden agrees to invite her to the house for dinner.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Mr. Walden, He Die. I Clean Room
programme.desc: Alan and Lyndsey's illicit affair puts Walden in danger, forcing him to accept Rose's help.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Numero Uno Accidente Lawyer
programme.desc: Walden's date with an accident-prone model goes longer than expected. Meanwhile, Alan dates a woman who shares some surprising personal information with him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Tazed in the Lady Nuts
programme.desc: Walden joins his beautiful former employee on a brilliant new project. Meanwhile, Alan advises Jenny to open up to her girlfriend or risk losing her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Baseball. Boobs. Boobs. Baseball.
programme.desc: Alan lets Lyndsey's boyfriend Larry set him up on a date. Meanwhile, Walden offers to help Nicole with her software project so she'll have time to date him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bite Me, Supreme Court
programme.desc: Walden and Alan throw Marty a bachelor party after he proposes to Evelyn, and his best friends help him celebrate his last days of bachelorhood.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Emotional Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Doug lies to Carrie and tells her that he regrets not accomplishing more in life and that he's going to sign up for the IPS management program. Meanwhile, Deacon, Arthur and Spence have a wonderful time at the amusement park riding 'Goliath.'

programme.title: The King of Queens: Four Play
programme.desc: When Doug realizes he has more in common with Deacon's wife than Deacon, he and Kelley start hanging out together. Meanwhile, Arthur feels betrayed by the coffee shop girl, Gloria, who is having great success by taking Arthur's relationship advice.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hartford Wailer
programme.desc: Carrie convinces her female co-workers to blow off a company retreat and take advantage of the hotel's spa. However, her plans are put into jeopardy when Doug surprises her and wants to spend the weekend watching the Planet of the Apes series.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fight Schlub
programme.desc: When Doug starts hanging out with Joe, a driver at Priority Plus, his fellow drivers lose all respect for him. Later, Doug discovers that Joe was only acting like his friend to get him alone so that he and his fellow drivers could play a trick on Doug.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Bahamian Rhapsody
programme.desc: After Barb was thrown in jail by immigration during Richard's and New Christine's disastrous wedding, Christine and Matthew head to the Bahamas to try to get her an illegal visa.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Burning Love
programme.desc: Christine and Richard are stunned when they meet up with some old college buddies and realize how much they have aged.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Mole
programme.desc: Christine discovers a suspicious mole but panics when she can't get into a doctor fast enough. Meanwhile, Richard decides he needs to move back in with New Christine.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: For Love or Money
programme.desc: After Barb has her lawyer send over divorce papers, Christine hires an aggressive divorce attorney who convinces her that Barb owes her alimony.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Doctor Little Man
programme.desc: When Christine begins seeing a therapist who shares office space with Matthew, it's unclear to both whether to pursue therapy or romance.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Curious Case of Britney B.
programme.desc: Christine considers herself popular by association when the most popular girl in school asks Ritchie to a dance. Meanwhile, Matthew and Richard try to evict an elderly woman from the apartment they hope to rent.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Nuts
programme.desc: Max points out to Christine that she quits everything she finds too hard including her relationships, which is why he chose to be her therapist instead of her boyfriend.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Love Means Never Having to Say You're Crazy
programme.desc: Christine sets Richard up on a date with a gorgeous woman, while Richard's friend Tom keeps trying to woo Christine.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: I Love Woo, I Hate You

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her granddaughter, Melissa, and the only thing that Blanche has on her mind is Melissa winning a Little Miss Beauty Contest. Meanwhile, Dorothy hires a nurse to look after a recuperating Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That's for Me to Know

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Where's Charlie?

programme.desc: Blanche begins dating a newscaster who has another woman interfering in his life: his mother. Meanwhile, Stan asks Dorothy to attend a counseling session with him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dateline, Miami

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: A hurricane is brewing, and not just outside, when Stan visits to tell Dorothy he's over her and moving on. Dorothy quickly discovers he's moving on with her sister, Gloria.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: Dorothy's discovery of Gloria sleeping with Stan just adds to their sibling rivalry. Meanwhile, Sophia has had it and leaves just prior the hurricane hitting.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Loves Miles
programme.desc: Rose has had it with Miles' penny pinching ways and decides to take Blanche's advice and go out with her and some big spenders. Meanwhile, Blanche has been left in charge of Sophia while Dorothy is away.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Room Seven
programme.desc: Sophia has an after-life experience, seeing her late husband in heaven, while choking on a piece of candy. Meanwhile, Blanche is distraught over the demolition of her grandmother's plantation, so the girls travel to Atlanta.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: From Here to the Pharmacy

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Pope's Ring
programme.desc: The Pope's in town and Sophia goes to his mass. When she goes to kiss his ring, it slips off into hers. Meanwhile, Rose is convinced Miles is hiding something from her, so as a birthday gift, Blanche gives Rose a detective to spy on Miles.

programme.desc: Villalobos is invited to participate in Dog Bowl, creating a chance for a handful of dogs to steal the spotlight. M2 helps a neglected dog left in horrible conditions. And a couple takes the first step towards becoming parents - adopting a Villalobos dog.

programme.desc: A dog called Baby is rushed to the clinic after being struck by a car. Four rats are relinquished to Susan and must be neutered before adoption. A little girl rescues kittens in Grand Junction, while a pair of lovable Yorkies come in with knee issues.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Missing Mama
programme.desc: The vet team must find a solution when mama baboon Qetesh's baby struggles with separation anxiety. Beloved seal Tarwin gives keeper Jose a big scare, and keeper Mark steps in as a surrogate for beautiful little Betsy.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Code Blue
programme.desc: Problems arise when beloved African wild dog Manna undergoes critical surgery. Treatment is needed for an elderly croc's ruptured cornea, and Jose and Kristie give pygmy hippo Felix the VIP treatment.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Head Over Heels

programme.title: North Woods Law: Close Encounters of the Wild Kind
programme.desc: When Maine's wildlife wanders into human territory, it's game wardens to the rescue. Wardens Marquis and Fitzpatrick try to catch a dumpster-diving bear. A wily woodchuck gives Warden Lounder a run for his money.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Homecoming
programme.desc: The game wardens bring closure at long last to one of the most confounding mysteries in Maine Warden Service history. They later reflect on their years of service.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Buck Fever
programme.desc: In the final week of Maine's deer season, some hunters are desperate to bag a buck. Warden Robertson confronts a felon with an illegal gun and a pile of bait. Warden Carter investigates teen hunters terrorizing a neighborhood.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Big Bad Woods
programme.desc: Anything can happen in Maine's 17 million acres of rugged wilderness. Angry hunters get loud with Warden Lounder over an illegal deer. Warden MacCabe enlists a 90-year-old local to help catch a deer baiter. A missing hunter sets off a full-scale search.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Excuses, Excuses
programme.desc: Hunting season heats up as Warden Herring calls in the air wing to track illegal activity on a game preserve. Warden Blanchard catches an intentional violator red-handed. Wardens Carter and McBrine execute a search warrant on a known poacher.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Coastal Criminals
programme.desc: Officer James Benvenuti chases down two lobster poachers in Rye. In a puzzling case, Officer Graham Courtney investigates a man on the beach found covered in blood. And Sergeant Adam Cheney attempts to apprehend trespassers on the railroad tracks.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Invisible Evidence
programme.desc: Officer Egan investigates the mysterious death of a deer. Officer Courtney and Lt. Cheney help a seal stuck in a tidal creek. Officer Bronson catches a young fisherman in a lie. And Officers lead the search for a woman with a head injury.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Triple Threat
programme.desc: Up north, Sgt. Lucas checks duck hunters. Down south, Officer Benvenuti and Trainee Crouse question a man suspected of hunting over bait. Later, Sgt. Lucas and Officer Holmes attempt to free a cub stuck inside a trap before its mother returns.

programme.title: North Woods Law: A Test of Strength
programme.desc: Officer Demler helps a hiker with a severe shoulder injury. Officer Fluette and K-9 Moxie take their certification test. Officer Holmes and trainee Frye look for evidence of an illegal deer kill. Officer MacFadzen bonds with his son on a hunting trip.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Riverside Stakeout
programme.desc: Nature lovers show up for Discover Wild New Hampshire Day. Officers conduct an undercover surveillance. Officer McKee rescues a starving owl from the side of the road. Later on, Mount Monadnock, a perilous rescue of an injured hiker.

programme.title: Doomsday Caught on Camera: A Tornado of Bats and More
programme.desc: A father/son camping trip turns into a battle against a raging wildfire in an intense race to survive. A towering avalanche on Mount Everest blindsides and buries climbers in their camp. A super typhoon crashes a wedding in the Philippines.

programme.title: Doomsday Caught on Camera: Mudslide of Mayhem and More
programme.desc: Four brave firefighters fight for survival as a raging wildfire ravages their truck. A monstrous mudslide decimates an entire neighborhood. Travelers scramble for cover when a tornado blasts through an airport terminal.

programme.title: Doomsday Caught on Camera: A Twister on a Rampage and More
programme.desc: A boating trip turns terrifying when a volcano violently erupts. A helpless onlooker witnesses the raw power and destruction of a raging flash flood. An avalanche buries a family and their truck on a Colorado highway.

programme.title: Doomsday Caught on Camera: The Cruise From Hell and More
programme.desc: A man trapped in a twister comes face-to-face with death. Four thousand passengers trapped on a cruise ship in the middle of the ocean get pelted with a terrifying bomb cyclone. A raging flood blasts through a quiet Maryland town, destroying all.

programme.title: Doomsday Caught on Camera: Blazing Wildfires and More
programme.desc: A violent microburst sends thousands running for cover at a music festival. A massive mudslide turns an evening commute unto a living nightmare. Evacuees flee for their lives as a raging wildfire closes in on them at every turn.

programme.title: Monsters and Mysteries in America: Evil Gnomes, Bigfoot Wars, Hell Hounds
programme.desc: Much of inland California is a remote wilderness. Within the Sierra Mountains, come legends of the Bigfoot War and a terrifying Evil Gnome that stalks an innocent family. Further south, the legendary Hellhound wreaks havoc in a desert neighbourhood.

programme.title: Monsters and Mysteries in America: Momo, Shadow People, Van Meter Monster
programme.desc: A vicious hairy beast, a giant winged creature, and shadow monsters terrify their witnesses and plunge towns across America into panic and fear.

programme.title: Monsters and Mysteries in America: Sykesville Monster/ Lechuza/ The Rake
programme.desc: A towering nocturnal monster and an owl witch relentlessly stalk the young and innocent. Sightings of a wildman beast plunged a town into panic and may even have launched a secret government search.

programme.title: Monsters and Mysteries in America: Pukwudgie, Aliens, Dover Demon
programme.desc: The Bridgewater Triangle is shrouded with inexplicable phenomena and UFO sightings. A deadly swamp Pukwudgie attacked Bill Russo, the Hewins sisters are used as a breeders for aliens, and the Dover Demon reigns over an entire town.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Mo' Money, Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Eva's post-honeymoon bliss crashes down around her as Marlo serves up a steaming pot of tea regarding her living situation. Since her melt down at Eva's wedding, Nene struggles over what's next for her marriage.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Caught in the Middle
programme.desc: Porsha gets ready for her gender reveal, only to have her hopes dashed before the celebration even begins. Eva pushes past the rumors surrounding her finances and re-evaluates her friendships. Cynthia's old friend makes a surprise appearance at her event.

programme.title: Movie: Coyote Ugly
programme.desc: A shy aspiring songwriter comes out of her shell while working at a popular New York bar.

programme.title: Movie: Burlesque
programme.desc: The owner of a burlesque lounge struggles to keep the club open. Meanwhile, a girl from small town Iowa falls in love with the art of burlesque and fulfills her dreams.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City: Roaring Emotions
programme.desc: At the conclusion of Whitney’s 20s Party, Jen’s explosive temper reaches a boiling point and Meredith and Mary are the targets. Meredith finally reveals the truth about her marriage to Lisa.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: What Would Michelle O Do?
programme.desc: Marlo takes Porsha on a hookah and Hennessy-fueled pedal tour to get her mind off her break up. Kenya deals with her own relationship issues and visits an estate lawyer to discuss the worst-case scenario. Rumours abound that someone recorded Cynthia.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Head Over 'Hills'
programme.desc: Cynthia's boyfriend Mike decides he's ready to take their relationship to the next level and across town Kandi questions Todd's business moves. Cynthia invites Marlo to lunch to get to the bottom of 'snakegate' and Nene extends an olive branch.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: A Whine of a Time
programme.desc: The ladies head to Canada to partake in the annual Toronto Carnival but before the festivities can get started, Porsha gets a few things off her chest after Kandi reveals that Eva has not been the loyal friend she claims to be.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Living on the Edge
programme.desc: After an icy welcome in Toronto, Nene lays out her standing with each of the girls. Nene and Eva sit face to face and revisit old wounds, while a group trust exercise forces the ladies to live on the edge in an unexpected way. A surprise shocks everyone.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Snake Bye
programme.desc: Porsha is taken by surprise when ex-fiancé Dennis pops up with a ring and unexpected question. Toronto Carnival becomes a circus of intrigue at the final dinner when accusations fly about infidelities and a mysterious lady.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: A Hairy Situation
programme.desc: Eva is determined to get Marley's last name legally changed, but her biological father may present a roadblock. Now that Dennis has re-proposed to Porsha, he has to also win her family back. Tanya gets messy and dishes out a secret she has on Kenya.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Hot Tea With a Side of Cookies
programme.desc: Cynthia brings Tanya and Kenya together to work out their differences after Toronto, but Kenya arrives with a shady guest in tow. Porsha and Dennis go back to couples counseling, while Todd finally makes good on his promise to spend more time with Kandi.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Lions, and Tigers and Shade
programme.desc: Cynthia and NeNe finally sit down to attempt to work through their differences. In an effort to reconcile, NeNe invites the ladies to a brunch, but things don't go according to plan when some guests leave early while other arrive unannounced.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Kenya vs. Ken
programme.desc: Cynthia and Mike's relationship is tested when his past becomes too much for Cynthia to handle. The girls kick out their frustrations during a game of kickball. Marc is back in town and invites Kenya's nemesis to group 'couple bowling.'

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: In the Name of Charity
programme.desc: Cynthia hosts a baby shower for Eva and hopes for an afternoon of love and light despite lingering tensions in the group. When the fun and games are over, Kenya makes a bold request of Tanya.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Greece Is the Word
programme.desc: Kenya and Marc announce their divorce. Kandi and Cynthia ask the women to be on their best behavior, but the ask is nearly impossible for Nene and Marlo. After the announcement, Kenya shows up to Greece in good spirits.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: A Greek Tragedy in 6 Acts
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding with Nene, Kenya is ready to put the drama behind her but finds herself in hot water with Cynthia when she asks some inappropriate questions. An intense conversation rehashing old wounds brings Porsha and Nene to tears.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Mountains
programme.desc: In this episode we climb high into the world's great mountain ranges. Only a few pioneering animals have what it takes to survive up here, they are amongst the most elusive and mysterious on the planet.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles are the richest places on Earth. A magical world of surprise, drama and unforgettable wild characters. From the jungles of Brazil to Costa Rica, watch as the animals face life in the most competitive place on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Deserts
programme.desc: In this episode we visit the world's deserts, a land of extremes that pushes life to the limit. Animals here have developed ingenious ways of dealing with the hostile conditions giving rise to the most incredible survival stories on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Grasslands
programme.desc: Grasslands cover one quarter of all land and support the greatest gatherings of wildlife on Earth. The extraordinary creatures that live here must survive the most hostile seasons on the planet.

programme.title: Baby Chimp Rescue: Miracles Can Happen
programme.desc: At a home for rescued baby chimps in Liberia, couple Jim and Jenny Desmond teach the orphans the skills they would have learnt from their mothers in the wild. They rescue a new orphan called "Miracle" from her life on a chain.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Islands
programme.desc: For some, remote islands offer sanctuary away from the mainland: the tiny pygmy three-toed sloth only survives because of the peace and safety offered by its Caribbean island home, while seabirds like albatross thrive in predator-free isolation.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Great Barrier Reef
programme.desc: The Great Barrier Reef's size is revealed as a mosaic of environments. However, scale isn't the only success of this micro world. The reef exists in nutrient poor waters, which on the face of it, is too poor to support all this life.

programme.title: Africa's Deadliest: Cat Attack
programme.desc: In Africa, big cats clawed their way to the top of the food chain. Every hunt is a deadly execution of power, stealth and speed. In the quiet of the night, no prey will hear them coming. Beware of getting stalked by Africa’s deadliest cats.

programme.title: Africa's Deadliest: Ganglands
programme.desc: There are two types of animals in the animal kingdom: the hunter and the hunted. Alone, it’s tough to survive in this world. In a team, the odds improve. For each gang, a territory. For each territory, a war.

programme.desc: This is an action-packed showcase of Africa’s top 10 deadliest ambush hunters.

programme.desc: From the masters of ambush to fatal assassins, Africa’s deadliest are featured.

programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dr. Jan Pol as he treats animals at his clinic in rural Michigan.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: My Fair Piggy
programme.desc: The Isabella County Fair is just around the corner, which means Dr. Pol, Dr. Emily and Dr. Brenda are busy treating fair animals, making sure they are in tiptop shape for competition.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Cowhide and Seek
programme.desc: Runaways, adventurists, and escape artists, the Pol's have their hands full, between bulls on the loose, and an attempted kitten getaway.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Fix-It-All
programme.desc: Clients take matters into their own hands and our vets have a slew of do-it-yourself doctoring to repair. As if they're not busy enough at the clinic, Dr. Pol, Diane and Charles embark on some ambitious home improvement projects at the lake house.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Revenge of the Nazi Doppelganger
programme.desc: Startling new evidence suggests that Hitler's second-in-command was secretly replaced by a doppelganger to escape war crimes and impending justice; armed with cutting-edge forensic science, a team of experts investigates.

programme.title: What on Earth?: African Murder Forest
programme.desc: Investigating a remote and isolated forest containing gigantic razor sharp spikes of stone, lead experts to believe the landscape may be linked to a sadistic and blood-thirsty African queen.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Amazon's Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: When satellites spot anomalies in the unexplored Amazonian jungle, experts wonder if they've discovered relics of a lost civilization. An on-the-ground investigation reveals a dark truth that's more sinister than ever imagined.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hitler's Lost Gold
programme.desc: New evidence might finally identify the hiding place of Hitler's billion-dollar gold train. A discovery of a long-lost settlement rewrites the history of the Vikings in North America. A blood-red river in Siberia points to catastrophic pollution.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of Fang Forest
programme.desc: A strange forest of razor-sharp stones could be home of an undiscovered Hobbit-like humanoid species. When a man-made island mysteriously appears off the US coast, grisly new evidence points to secret government experiments into psycho-chemical warfare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Amazon's Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: When satellites spot anomalies in the unexplored Amazonian jungle, experts wonder if they've discovered relics of a lost civilization. An on-the-ground investigation reveals a dark truth that's more sinister than ever imagined.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Zombietown USA
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of an abandoned town hidden in the American wilderness, and as experts analyze this new evidence, they reveal what this strange place has to do with a top-secret military plan to battle an army of the undead.

programme.title: How It's Made: Replica Clay Pipes; Drinking Fountains; Orange Liqueur; Compound Bows
programme.desc: On this episode of How It's Made, find out how Replica Clay Pipes, Drinking Fountains, Orange Liqueur, and Compound Bows are made.

programme.title: Jessica Chambers: An ID Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When first responders find severely burned 19-year-old Jessica Chambers on a rural road, they are shocked by the sheer brutality of the crime with no trace of the killer. The investigation ignites a firestorm that tears a community apart.

programme.title: Who Killed the Lyon Sisters?
programme.desc: Featuring bestselling author Mark Bowden, secret police recordings and first-person accounts, this doc explores the haunting 1975 disappearance of 2 sisters from a Maryland mall and the predatory backwoods clan that may have hidden the crime for 40 years.

programme.title: Who Killed the Lyon Sisters?
programme.desc: Featuring bestselling author Mark Bowden, secret police recordings and first-person accounts, this doc explores the haunting 1975 disappearance of 2 sisters from a Maryland mall and the predatory backwoods clan that may have hidden the crime for 40 years.

programme.title: What Happened in Apartment 23?
programme.desc: A Northeastern University student is found dead in her own apartment. Surveillance video reveals her final moments, but the mystery behind her murder remains unsolved for years until finally, a witness comes forward.

programme.title: Who Killed Jessica Carpenter? A Hometown Homicide Mystery
programme.desc: In the afternoon of August 2000, 17-year-old Jessica Carpenter was found dead in her Aiken, SC home by her own mother. New interviews add shocking details to the story of a town frozen in terror as police search for a possible serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: The Missing: Missing Mother and Child
programme.desc: Joanna Clark doesn't show up to work and her daughter, Shariece, misses school. They both vanish on the same day, just hours apart. And then pregnant Akia Eggleston misses her baby shower and is never seen again.

programme.title: The Missing: Out the Door
programme.desc: Jesse Ross goes on a school trip to Chicago, but never returns to his hotel room. He is seen on video, but police find no trace of him. And then Alexis Scott leaves a party in Peoria, Illinois, but police can't track her down.

programme.title: Who Killed Jessica Carpenter? A Hometown Homicide Mystery
programme.desc: In the afternoon of August 2000, 17-year-old Jessica Carpenter was found dead in her Aiken, SC home by her own mother. New interviews add shocking details to the story of a town frozen in terror as police search for a possible serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: The Missing: Missing Mother and Child
programme.desc: Joanna Clark doesn't show up to work and her daughter, Shariece, misses school. They both vanish on the same day, just hours apart. And then pregnant Akia Eggleston misses her baby shower and is never seen again.

programme.title: The Missing: Out the Door
programme.desc: Jesse Ross goes on a school trip to Chicago, but never returns to his hotel room. He is seen on video, but police find no trace of him. And then Alexis Scott leaves a party in Peoria, Illinois, but police can't track her down.

programme.title: What Happened in Apartment 23?
programme.desc: A Northeastern University student is found dead in her own apartment. Surveillance video reveals her final moments, but the mystery behind her murder remains unsolved for years until finally, a witness comes forward.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: No Average Troublemaker
programme.desc: When teenager Bridgett Frisbie sneaks out of her Katy, TX home one night, her parents assume it's just typical teenage rebellion. But the next day, a group of boys find her body in the woods just outside of town.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: When longtime resident Sharron Erickson is found raped and murdered in the tiny Midwestern town of Colon, Nebraska, the community is stunned that the recent retiree could be the victim of such a savage crime.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Hellfire in the Hollow
programme.desc: When a 21-year-old mother doesn't return from night classes and her car is found burned, investigators immediately suspect foul play. However no one is prepare for the web of lies that ultimately unfold due to her disappearance.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who's Missing Now
programme.desc: When beloved young waitress Zilpha Lowery goes missing, foul play is immediately suspected. Rumors of her fate drift through town and tie her to another mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Friendly Foes
programme.desc: The double homicide of a young mother and her 21-month-old daughter sends Galax's tiny police force on a frenzied mission to stop unspeakable evil in its tracks.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Mommy, Please Come Home
programme.desc: The tiny town of Glendive, Montana is paralyzed with fear when mother of four Susan Casey vanishes. The ensuing investigation leaves everyone to wonder if one of Susan's former flames is harboring a sinister secret - or if someone else is stalking her.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Trailing the Devil
programme.desc: A nightmare wreaks havoc on the village of Armada, Michigan when 14-year-old April Millsap is found murdered on the community's most popular bike trail. Very little evidence leaves investigators running down clues to bring this monster to justice.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Branches of Evil
programme.desc: Tray Phelps, a beloved father, son and fiancée was found beaten to death in his own driveway. The small town of Hayti, Missouri is stunned to discover that a web of evil lurks just beneath the surface of the seemingly idyllic hamlet.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: A Deceitful Heart
programme.desc: When Michael Lee Smith's body is found shot, partially nude, and dumped on the side of the road, the town of Berkley, Michigan is scandalized. Police are forced to sift through lies and alibis as they attempt to track down the killer.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Wishing Well Mystery
programme.desc: After Alyce Seff's body is found in a wishing well, the town of German Village, Ohio, is shocked to find the elderly landlady had as many enemies as she did friends. It will take police nine years to solve her case.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Scared Silent
programme.desc: When Marshall Dent goes missing on Christmas Eve, the Native American community of Shawnee, Oklahoma bands together. After weeks of searching, Marshall is found in a shallow grave on sacred ground, leaving authorities scrambling to find the killer.

programme.title: American Monster: The Last Valentine
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, Dr. John Hamilton and his wife Susan are the envy of all: successful, respected and very much in love - until a vicious Valentine's Day murder destroys their lives.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Fortress of War
programme.desc: The Story of how two CIA operatives, in search of Osama bin Laden, stop a Taliban uprising in an Afghan fortress. They are outnumbered leaving one operative to pay the ultimate price.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Argo: The Secret Story
programme.desc: America is at its knees as the infamous US Embassy Hostage crisis begins, but then the CIA discovers that six diplomats have secretly escaped. When they recruit in their ace 'rescue' agent Tony Mendez to get them out, he devises a 'Hollywood'- plan.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood-soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Georgia Mountain Treehouse
programme.desc: A couple sets out to create their dream treehouse retreat in Northern Georgia overlooking the Blue Ridge Mountains. Although the build calls for a mile-long, uphill trek with their materials, the end result is the ultimate childhood dream come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Straw Bale Cabin
programme.desc: An eco-friendly couple fights an early winter to build a timber and straw-bale cabin in Maine.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Getaway
programme.desc: A family attempts to build a 400-square foot cabin situated on a small island in Northern Idaho. Access to the property is limited and rough waters make it difficult to bring materials in. It's a race to the finish as winter hits the island early.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cascade Mountain Escape
programme.desc: A couple builds their 2400-square-foot dream cabin in the Cascade Mountains of Washington State.

programme.title: Building Alaska: My Life Is in Your Hands

programme.title: Building Alaska: From Temporary to Permanent
programme.desc: Mike and Kathleen begin on the foundation, but their nail gun goes on the fritz and the posts aren't level. Dog mushers Paige and Cody run low on supplies. Mike and Teresa work on their foundation with a damaged excavator.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Life of Near Misses
programme.desc: Paige and Cody realize they don't have the correct insulation for their log walls. Kathleen and Mike's team get dangerously high up to install the ridge beam. Mike and Teresa begin work on their floor, but discover the joists are not evenly spaced.

programme.title: Building Alaska: It's Stressful Right Now
programme.desc: Mike and Teresa begin building their walls, but the winch is more dangerous than they realized. Paige and Cody use a boom truck, forcing the team to work extra cautiously. Mike and Kathleen find a nasty surprise at the bottom of the mountain.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Crazy Delicious Doughnuts
programme.desc: In Portland, Ore., there's a place that specializes in grown up versions that feature bold glazes and boozy fillings.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Seattle Sweets
programme.desc: Seattle these days has a reputation for sublime sweet treats.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Southern Sweets in Atlanta
programme.desc: Southern desserts are in a category all to their own combining big bold flavours with deep tradition.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: European Sweets
programme.desc: Today we're getting a sweet taste of Europe right here in the United States.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Reinvention
programme.desc: In New York City a charming little shop in putting a gourmet spin on a crisp rice treat, with flavours loved by children and adults alike.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Capital Cravings
programme.desc: We visit some of the eateries that satisfy the sweet cravings of Washington, D.C.'s power brokers, including Golden Brown Delicious and Cupcakes Actually.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolicious
programme.desc: We're getting the inside scoop on all things chocolate. Alton Brown takes a trip to Charleston, S.C., for some heavenly chocolate pudding, while Aaron Sanchez has some not-so-classic New York pizza.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Kids' Menu
programme.desc: From macaroni and cheese to milkshakes to pizza, these are the greatest dishes found on- and inspired b- the kids' menu. Alex Guarnaschelli shares her comfort food lunch favourite from Ted's Bulletin in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Low and Slow
programme.desc: Patience is a virtue, and the greatest mouthwatering dishes can't be rushed. Wolfgang Puck admires APL Restaurant in Los Angeles for making a sandwich that's well worth the wait.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Borrowed Favourites
programme.desc: Sharing is caring, and the treats that family and friends love become personal favourites too! Robert Irvine takes his wife's advice and discovers the world's greatest omelet at Babystacks Cafe in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Head outside for the best of both worlds: breathtaking scenery with fresh air, clear skies and the most-incredible waterfront dining in the U.S. Anne Burrell adores the sights with a meaty pasta from Cecconi's Dumbo in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Wisconsin
programme.desc: Andrew visits America's Dairy Land, but he finds out there's a lot more going on with the food in Wisconsin than meets the eye. Andrew finds that Wisconsinites are finding new ways to do things the old fashioned way. He discovers the science behind milk.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Austin
programme.desc: The food in Austin can get a little weird but that's a compliment in a city where funky is part of the pioneer spirit.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Delhi
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the cuisine of Delhi, India's capital and home to roughly 24 million people.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Cod
programme.desc: Andrew explores the treasures of Cape Cod's coastal cuisine. From fried clams to fresh-caught cod, clambakes to cranberry bog ice cream, the Massachusetts peninsula's culinary scene is cause for summertime celebration.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bangkok: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Bangkok, Thailand, has so many culinary treasures, it deserves a second trip! From steamed whole bass to massaman curry, Andrew highlights the city's exotic flavors and meals that are meant to be shared.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Cakes
programme.desc: Meet the 13 bakers who make simple sandwich cakes in the Signature challenge, angel food cakes in Mary’s Technical challenge and all things chocolate in the showstopper.

programme.title: Classic Christmas (My Music)
programme.desc: Old-fashioned favorites such as 'Silent Night,' 'White Christmas' and 'Jingle Bells' are featured.

programme.title: Christmas With Daniel O'Donnell
programme.desc: Remember happy childhood memories with Daniel O'Donnell's classic collection of holiday favourites.

programme.title: Dreaming of a Jewish Christmas
programme.desc: The story of the group of Jewish songwriters who wrote the soundtrack to Christmas is shared.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Bully
programme.desc: An art patron discovers a gruesome work of art, which leads to a gallery visitor finding a dead woman in her apartment above.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: A man sees his wife being assaulted and abducted while video chatting with her. When the kidnappers demand ransom and send the missing housewife to pick up the money, detectives grow suspicious of her story.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Lost Reputation
programme.desc: The SVU squad is still dealing from the fallout after Captain Cragen wakes up with a dead escort in his bed. Amaro works on his marriage.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: December Solstice
programme.desc: Celebrity author Walter Briggs is the focus of a feud between his sixth wife and his daughters from previous marriages. The fight over control for both his well-being and his estate become a criminal case when Charmaine is accused of abuse.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Heartfelt Passages
programme.desc: When the investigation of Corrections Officer Gary Munson deepens, he and his union take drastic actions that threaten the lives of ADA Barba and the SVU Squad.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: An infant goes missing and the SVU take sides during the family's right-to-die case. Barba's interference in the case puts the DA's office in jeopardy.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Plastic
programme.desc: A woman accuses a celebrity plastic surgeon and his girlfriend of rape.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Part 33
programme.desc: As Stone prosecutes the case of a woman who killed her abusive husband, Benson and her squad wrestle with the duty of testifying against her.

programme.title: Modern Family: CHiPs and Salsa
programme.desc: When Haley hears that her loopy boss is looking for a product with the magical properties of peppers, she tries to gain favour by convincing Gloria to sell her salsa to NERP. Then, Mitchell gets Cam the police ride-along he’s always dreamed of.

programme.title: Modern Family: Mother!
programme.desc: When Dede drops in unexpectedly, Mitchell and Cam come to a realization about her effect on their lives; Phil, Luke, Alex and Haley all have different bad news to break to Claire and compete about when to do it.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Escape
programme.desc: Haley meets Arvin's parents but when things don't go as planned, fate leads to an unexpected reunion with all of her ex-boyfriends. Meanwhile, the family seizes on a nursing home visit with Jay's mean sister, Becky, to settle old scores.

programme.title: Modern Family: Clash of Swords
programme.desc: Mitchell sneaks out to 'Hero-Con' with fanboy Phil, dressed as their favourite characters from the show 'Clash of Swords.' It's great until Phil commits the ultimate fan faux pas.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Scourge
programme.desc: Munch and Fin canvass the streets searching for a religiously motivated serial killer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Sacrifice
programme.desc: Detectives investigate when an unidentified man is found shot and gang-sodomized in an alley outside of a gay bar.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Choice
programme.desc: A mother switches from victim to accused as the life of her unborn child is threatened.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Goliath
programme.desc: Violent behaviour is linked to an anti-malaria drug, which was administered by the army.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Living Legend
programme.desc: In the ultimate 'who-dunnit,' the team investigates a baffling mystery involving an infamous mob boss from the seventies, who's Cadillac mysteriously resurfaces in a Las Vegas lake.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Anonymous
programme.desc: After a state department employee and a plastic surgeon are murdered by a group of terrorists, the NCIS team must frantically search for the only witness who can identify the killers' surgically altered faces.

programme.title: NCIS: A Desperate Man
programme.desc: When a navy lieutenant commander is found dead in a building under construction, NCIS must search for a killer while dealing with interruptions from her distraught detective husband. Meanwhile, Ray's return has Ziva thinking about her future.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Price We Pay
programme.desc: Tensions between Voight and Antonio builds as Internal Affairs digs into a murder case which potentially involves Voight's son.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Different Mistakes
programme.desc: Voight is assigned to a new Internal Affairs handler, Stillwell, who proves to be suspicious of Voight's actions.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Material Witness
programme.desc: A case hits close to home when the intelligence unit takes on a gang shooting with one living witness.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Docks
programme.desc: As Antonio's life is now in question, Voight and Platt open up about their pasts. Jin is caught while tinkering with Voight's computer and uses the only scapegoat possible to keep him in the clear.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Beautiful Friendship
programme.desc: Atwater is settling into his new gig on intelligence as Antonio is relegated to desk duty while recovering. Lindsay finally realizes she has no way out and confides in Voight for help.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Prison Ball
programme.desc: The team goes undercover in a prison to gather information on the murder of a young girl.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: They'll Have to Go Through Me

programme.title: Frosty the Snowman
programme.desc: A discarded silk top hat becomes the focus of a struggle between a washed-up stage magician and a group of schoolchildren after it brings a snowman to life. Pursued by the greedy magician and rising temperatures, Frosty sets off for the North Pole.

programme.title: Rudolph, the Red-Nosed Reindeer
programme.desc: Recount the tale of a shy reindeer whose Christmas spirit is dampened because his shiny red nose has made him the laughing stock of all Christmasville. Based on the popular song by Johnny Marks and narrated by Burl Ives.

programme.title: Movie: Home Alone
programme.desc: A young boy is accidentally left at home when his family goes away for Christmas vacation. He must fend for himself as he faces burglars, scary neighbours and other obstacles. At first he enjoys his freedom, but soon wants his family back for Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York
programme.desc: A young boy mistakenly takes the wrong plane when his family goes on Christmas vacation and ends up in New York City, fending off suspicious hotel staff, a kindly bird woman in disguise and two burglars he fought against last Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: The Santa Clause 3: The Escape Clause
programme.desc: Santa prepares for a busy Christmas with the mischievous Jack Frost as his assistant. The Jolly Old Elf has his work cut out for him when he has to deal with sabotage and a visit from his in-laws.

programme.desc: Martin and Gina worry at their bachelor parties, and imagine what life will be like in five years.

programme.desc: Will and Carleton almost ruin everything for Hilary's show; Ashley wants to move to NY.

programme.desc: Will gets into a brawl with Dougie the Whale in front of a group of young children.

programme.desc: Jay wants Michael to find a way for his parents to start speaking to each other again.

programme.desc: Jr. wants Michael to teach him how to box so he can protect Claire from her boyfriend.

programme.desc: It's Michael's relaxed coaching vs. Janet's tough training for Kady's soccer team.

programme.desc: Michael has second thoughts about letting Janet work for him when she changes his routine.

programme.desc: Jr. takes an intelligence test that ranks him in the genius category.

programme.desc: Michael pretends to be hurt so his family will have to cater to his every whim.

programme.desc: Overton and Synclaire exchange wedding vows.

programme.desc: As Overton and Synclaire prepare to tie the knot, Kyle wrestles with a knotty decision.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Evergreen: Bells Are Ringing
programme.desc: As her wedding approaches, a woman steps up to help launch a new museum, all while questioning if marrying her fiancé is the right choice.

programme.title: Movie: Five Star Christmas
programme.desc: When a travel writer shows up unexpectedly at their dad's B&B, the Ralston family all pretend to be guests in hopes of a good review.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas She Wrote
programme.desc: A romance writer has her column cancelled right before Christmas, so she heads home to reconnect with her family and sparks some romance of her own.

programme.title: Movie: Sense, Sensibility and Snowmen
programme.desc: A Christmas enthusiast, and her sister, clash with their latest client, a not-so-jolly toy company CEO.

programme.title: Movie: My Christmas Dream
programme.desc: A manager of a department store is determined to land a position in the new Paris location. She sets out to impress the store's owner by creating the best display in stores' history.

programme.title: Movie: A December Bride
programme.desc: An aspiring interior designer is dreading the wedding of her cousin, who is marrying her ex-fiancé. She accepts an offer to go with a friend, the one responsible for introducing the soon-to-be bride and groom.

programme.title: Movie: Sharing Christmas
programme.desc: A real estate developer is given the opportunity to transform an old shopping complex into a prime location. Unfortunately, there is one tenant who is holding out, the Christmas shop owner he met just days earlier.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Made to Order
programme.desc: A Christmas amateur finds himself in charge of his family's holiday celebration. Desperate for help, he enlists an expert in all things Christmas and together, they discover what's truly important in life.

programme.title: Movie: Sleigh Bells Ring
programme.desc: A recently divorced woman struggles to get into the holiday spirit while heading up her hometown parade. With the help of a Christmas sleigh and a handsome woodworker, she is destined to turn her luck around.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Martina McBride is here to make cookies and Dave Koz performs with his saxophone.

programme.title: Movie: Let It Snow
programme.desc: When a resort executive is sent to a newly purchased lodge in Maine with instructions to turn it into an ultra-modern resort, she finds a charming, successful lodge loaded with holiday spirit and makes a connection with the owner's handsome son.

programme.title: Movie: On the 12th Date of Christmas
programme.desc: Two co-workers vying for the same promotion are tasked with creating a 12 Days of Christmas scavenger hunt to promote the premiere of a new hotel.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Fockers

programme.title: Movie: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: Two womanizers sneak into weddings in order to take advantage of the romantic tinge in the air.

programme.title: Movie: Get Hard
programme.desc: When a millionaire is convicted of fraud, he's given 30 days to get his affairs in order before doing time in San Quentin. Terrified of what prison life has in store for him, he hires his black friend to prep him for the experience.

programme.title: Movie: Superbad
programme.desc: Two nerdy high school seniors attend a party in hopes of losing their virginity before going off to different colleges.

programme.title: South Park: Kenny Dies

programme.title: South Park: Worldwide Recorder Concert

programme.title: South Park: City on the Edge of Forever (Flashbacks)

programme.title: South Park: Sexual Harassment Panda

programme.title: South Park: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls

programme.desc: Richard and Aaron head to Roswell to pick-up a 1967 Ford Galaxie 500.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Ford Galaxie, Part II/ Nash Healey
programme.desc: With Aaron temporarily missing, the crew works on the Ford Galaxie. The shop gets crank calls from a guy claiming to be Dale Earnhardt Jr.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: '71 Cool Kingwood/ Retro Replicar
programme.desc: Aaron and crew turn an ugly duckling '71 Chevy Kingwood station wagon into the cool '70s hot rod dragster it was meant to be. Richard pries a 1980 MG Replicar from a husband reluctant to part with it. The Grill books its first musical act.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Shelby Rent-A-Racer Resto, Part I
programme.desc: The crew takes on a '68 Shelby Mustang that looks sweet, but what's it hiding? Richard flips his lid when Tom and Jordan buy two junker cars from two tourists. Richard and KC travel to a secret lair to make a deal on a Lotus Cortina and an amphibicar.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Shelby Rent-A-Racer Resto, Part II
programme.desc: Engine issues plague the '68 Shelby. Richard flips the rare '66 Lotus Cortina and floating Amphicar for some fast cash. A classic Ford Falcon arrives at the garage and selling it would be icing on the cake.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Holy Grail Firebirds, Part I
programme.desc: Richard makes a risky deal to restore the first two Firebirds ever made from rusted and rough to museum quality. The buyer offers a handsome deal, but it comes with a crushing deadline and a 10K/day penalty for every day he's late. Aaron learns to race.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Holy Grail Firebirds, Part II
programme.desc: With a 10K-a-day penalty looming, Richard can't afford to lose any more time on the two Firebirds' concourse restoration, but by the end of the project, the garage will be short two Monkeys. Richard flips a '49 Mercury that comes complete with passenger.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Chopped and Dropped Model A, Part II
programme.desc: When Richard snaps back to his senses, he puts the monkeys back on track and they must finish the '31 Chopped Model A in ten days. It doesn't go without a lot of strife. Meanwhile, Richard and Dennis argue over a Holy Grail find of a '64 ½ Mustang.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Super Sonic Camero, Part II
programme.desc: The Monkey's go super big with their first corporate client Sonic Drive-In to build a promotional 68 Camaro SS convertible. But with only days left until delivery, Richard might miss out on a huge pay day, and tarnish his reputation.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: C10 Race Truck/ Pike's Peak Pace Truck, Part II
programme.desc: Pikes Peak International Race is three days away and the C10 pace truck is nowhere near being complete. Aaron struggles to keep the Falcon damage free as he approaches the race of his life.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: One Cool Impala
programme.desc: When Richard buys a '65 Chevy Impala, they put their Gas Monkey spin on it. Richard and Aaron score a '34 Five Window Ford. And later, Richard agrees to cool off the monkeys with new air conditioning, but the Fired Up crew gets hot and bothered about it.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Rocking '76 G10 Van
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron take on a different build when they to transform a $300 find on the side of the road into a '76 Exploration van. The Dale Earnhardt '56 Nomad makes an appearance back at the shop, as KC and his team are tasked with fixing the body.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Pillow Talk: Never Stop Fighting

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Countdown to the New Season
programme.desc: With a sneak peek at the new season, relive what Rebecca and Zied, Mike and Natalie, and Tarik and Hazel went through for love.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Tulle vs. Ta-Ta's

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: My Big Fat Ethiopian Wedding

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Little Sparkle Goes a Long Way

programme.desc: Utah housewife Jordan manages to only spend $1400 a month for her family of five by rationing everything and asking her neighbors for their leftovers.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Father Knows Debt

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Angel/ Mark
programme.desc: Although she's eight months pregnant, Angel frequents local junkyards on a regular basis with her husband Orlando. Mark lives in Las Vegas and yet he manages to not spend a penny of his full time salary.

programme.desc: Lydia Abate scours the obituaries, then visits surviving family members in hopes of taking the deceased person's clothing off of their hands. Mason Roberts introduces his wife to his entire family of cheapskates.

programme.desc: The discovery of a scalp leads to a conviction; a teenager kills and tortures young boys.

programme.desc: Four retired officers track down a killer; police wait for advancements in DNA technology.

programme.desc: Rochester police must race against time to prosecute an unknown schoolgirl rapist, or work to change the statutes. In 2003, San Diego forms a Cold Case Squad and re-opens the case of a young girl who had been stabbed and beaten to death.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: On the Case: Nacole's Killer

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Killer on Campus/ The Bow Hunter

programme.title: Killer Cases: The Doctor is Dead

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bellydancer
programme.desc: Learn about Murr and Sal's favourite sandwich, which Joker is certified in CPR and what gift Murr received when the show first started.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pick a Loser
programme.desc: Find out which Joker was arrested in a foreign country and why the Jokers filmed at Madison Square Park often in the early days. Plus, learn the camera crew's motto.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Art Attack
programme.desc: Find out why hair dryers are banned from the set, what moment has become a fan and crew classic, and how Murr's blankie wound up on the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Find out which challenge became an instant classic, what act of kindness blew the crew away and what word the Jokers are responsible for in Urban Dictionary.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Early Thanksgiving Episode
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Soup's On Episode
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Murr and Sal dine and discuss their lives. Find out what's on the menu and whether they'll ever actually cook tenderloin.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Fitness Goals
programme.desc: Our interns examine surveillance videos, including a crocodile that breaks up a swimming pool hook-up and a bruising yacht dive fail.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Closer
programme.desc: Learn which challenges Murr's considers his favorite, who has an impressive sneaker collection and why the crew was on high alert during this punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: The Misery Index: Trust Me as Someone Who Has One!

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Christian approaches Ana and asks her to give him a second chance. She agrees with one condition: this time, there isn't going to be any rules or punishments. They start to build trust, but figures from Christian's past threaten to tear them apart.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Ana Steel and Christian Grey's fledgling marriage is threatened by jealously when his former lover works her way back into his life, but lurking beyond that is an even greater threat in the form of Ana's disgraced former employer who's out for revenge.

programme.title: Movie: Burlesque
programme.desc: The owner of a burlesque lounge struggles to keep the club open. Meanwhile, a girl from small town Iowa falls in love with the art of burlesque and fulfills her dreams.

programme.title: Celebrity Game Face: Santa’s Helpers and Holiday Dances
programme.desc: Joel McHale and Sarah McHale, Mike 'The Miz' Mizanin and Maryse Ouellet and Lamorne Morris and Alesha Renee compete remotely from their own homes in a special holiday-themed night of fun and games hosted by Kevin Hart.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: It Feels Good to be Home
programme.desc: Kanye says 'thank you' to Armenia by playing a surprise public concert there. Kim arranges a special stop in Jerusalem to have North baptized in Israel's oldest Armenian Church. Back in LA, everyone responds differently to having Caitlyn in their lives.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Vanity Unfair
programme.desc: When Caitlyn comes out in her first big magazine interview and says things the family considers hurtful, Kim does what she can to pick up the pieces. Meanwhile, Khloé must decide how much emotional support she can afford to give to Lamar.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Last Straw
programme.desc: Kourtney tries to keep it together as Scott's behavior spirals out of control, but when he's photographed in France with another woman, Kourtney is not sure how much more she can take. Khloé decides she must meet Caitlyn face to face.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: That Was Then This Is Now
programme.desc: Caitlyn is receiving a special award at the ESPYs, but with Kris still sore over public comments Caitlyn made about their marriage, the daughters must find a way to support Caitlyn while still being sensitive to Kris's feelings.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Price You Pay
programme.desc: Kourtney tries to find a new status quo with Scott while the rest of the family worries she's give in to him too easily. Khloé thinks twice about how much she does for her sisters. Kris braces for landfall as Kim and Kanye prepare to move back in.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rites of Passage
programme.desc: When Kylie graduates from high school, Kris decides to throw an extra special party. Kim's pregnancy cravings take her half way around the world. Khloé responds to a presence in her house by getting in touch with her psychic side.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Kylie's 18th birthday gives Kris a reason to meet Caitlyn for the first time. History repeats itself as Kim takes over Kris' home in preparation for baby number two. Khloé takes steps to move forward.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lions and Tigers and Texts
programme.desc: After finally choosing to move forward with her divorce, Khloé seeks solace in Mexico City at the big cat rescue foundation, Black Jaguar White Tiger. Meanwhile, Kris complicates matters by carrying on her own separate correspondence with Lamar.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Non-Bon Voyage
programme.desc: The family flies to St. Bart's to forget their troubles, but drama has a way of following them. Kourtney is distracted when she gets disturbing news about Scott and Kendall has beef with Kylie for bring her boyfriend Tyga.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Return From Paradise
programme.desc: With only a few days left in paradise, Kendall and Kylie try to sort out their differences while Kim and Khloé help Kourtney try to forget Scott and get her mojo back. When the family returns home, a visit from Scott throws them all for a loop.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashian Family Rules
programme.desc: What makes the Kardashians the Kardashians? Take a closer look at the funny, sexy and outrageous moments when we all fell in love with Reality's First Family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Big Launch
programme.desc: When Kourtney isn't ready for a big product launch in NYC, her sisters help her get her head in the game. Meanwhile, a very pregnant Kim accidently upsets her best friend Jonathan. Kim makes sure Kylie is making the most of her newfound opportunities.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fear the Unknown
programme.desc: Knowing her family's history with cancer, Kris wants the girls to take a genetic test to know their risks, but not everyone is on board. Meanwhile Kendall struggles to find a balance in her relationship with Caitlyn.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Miscommunication
programme.desc: Kris decides the family needs 'Communication Therapy,' but her plans backfire when she misses one of the sessions. Kylie is finally ready to celebrate her new home but her family's bossy ways get in the way of her plans.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Great Kris
programme.desc: Follow the one-of-a-kind family as well as their group of celebrity pals.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: Santa to the Rescue!
programme.desc: For one magical night, Santa Claus is a hero to all the world's kids. Host Raven-Symone challenges the five teams of cake and sugar artists to imagine what happens outside of the North Pole when Santa steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: The Great Turkey Escape
programme.desc: Just in time for Thanksgiving, host Raven-Symone challenges five teams of master cake and sugar artists to imagine what happens when all those holiday turkeys decide to make a break for it. Shinmin Li and Erin McGinn judge the daring turkey escapes.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: When Toys Come Alive ... And Go Wild
programme.desc: This year, a little too much holiday magic accidentally brings all the toys to life on Christmas morning. Host Raven-Symone asks the five teams to show judges Shinmin Li and Erin Acevedo what happens when the newly minted toys come alive.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: Critter Christmas
programme.desc: Host Raven-Symone asks the four remaining teams of cake and sugar artists to create the most over-the-top, crazy visions of a Christmas party in the animal kingdom. Shinmin Li and Erin Acevedo judge these wild critter holiday parties.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: North Pole Wedding
programme.desc: Host Raven-Symone challenges the four remaining teams of master cake and sugar artists to imagine the most-romantic wedding the world has ever seen at the North Pole. Judges Shinmin Li and Erin Acevedo decide which team will go home with $25,000.

programme.desc: Teams of professional cake and sugar artist compete to win $25,000.
