programme.desc: The $25,000 Comfort Food Feud continues with a battle devoted to pizza. The competitors find spaghetti and meatballs in an unusual form in the entree basket, and the dessert round involves some spicy, salty and sugary ingredients.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: On Thin Ice

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Fire and Ice

programme.title: Home Town: Sweet Home Laurel
programme.desc: A Laurel, MS, native is ready to plant roots in the place her family has called home for generations. With her all-in budget of $100,000, Erin and Ben create a beautiful transformation that includes a quaint home office and a master bedroom.

programme.title: Home Town: A House With History
programme.desc: Will, Courtney and their boys have outgrown their starter home, so they enlist Ben and Erin to help them find their forever house. On their wish list is a sizeable, historic house that's rich in character and small town charm.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Elbow Room
programme.desc: Jill and Joe love their ranch home's outdoor space, with a nice deck, a pool and a shed that Joe converted into a pub where the whole neighborhood congregates.

programme.title: Love It or List It: First House Frustrations
programme.desc: Ben and Courtney see their decision to begin a family the perfect time to buy their first home. They've found a 1930s-era, ivy-covered brick home. Despite its charm, this house has a lot of problems, including a flooded basement.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Pond Paradise

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong Son

programme.title: Movie: My Husband's Secret Twin

programme.title: Movie: Twisted Twin
programme.desc: Tess gets the surprise of a lifetime when she's approached by Sammy Crain, who happens to be her identical twin sister. Tess is excited to connect with her, but soon realizes Sammy has a devious plan.

programme.title: Movie: Deadly Daughter Switch
programme.desc: A woman learns her daughter isn't actually her biological daughter, throwing their family into crisis as they realize she was switched at birth.

programme.title: Monsters and Mysteries in America: Devil Monkey, Melonheads, Blue Albino
programme.desc: Across America, grotesque, angry, vicious mutant monsters are out for revenge. Victims of unexplained terror at the hands of Melonheads, Devil Monkey, and the Blue Albino Woman come forward to share their horrifying stories.

programme.title: Monsters and Mysteries in America: Chupacabra, Zombie Soldier, Lake Worth Monster
programme.desc: Texas is a hotbed of monster activity. The Lake Worth community is being terrorized by a hybrid man-goat; in Cuero Phylis Canion has proof of a Chupacabra; and in Brownsville a young couple is attacked by an aggressive Zombie soldier.

programme.title: Monsters and Mysteries in America: Wendigo, Dogman, Wolfman
programme.desc: In Michigan, Wendigo transforms men into cannibals; in the countryside, a man-wolf preys on the road and in the city; a bloodthirsty manimal confronts Jeff Cornelius.

programme.title: Monsters and Mysteries in America: Batsquatch, Jersey Devil, Flying Humanoid
programme.desc: The Batsquatch reigns terror from the skies in the Rio Grande, the Jersey Devil attacks residents of the Pine Barrens and the Flying Humanoid stalks the Missouri Ozarks.

programme.title: When Monsters Attack: The Ozark Howler
programme.desc: Recently disclosed audio recordings and astonishing photographs provide the most conclusive evidence to date that the elusive and terrifying beast with horns known for centuries as the Ozark Howler may have demonic origins.

programme.title: Survivorman: Bigfoot: Trails and Tales
programme.desc: Les follows a trail from Texas to Utah in his quest to catch Bigfoot on camera. He then returns to a legendary Sasquatch hot spot in the Canadian wild, where he encounters a more spiritual approach to the creature from believers.

programme.title: Bigfoot Is Real: Giant Swamp Creature
programme.desc: Gulf Coast Bigfoot Research Organization (GCBRO) founders Bobby Hamilton and Jim Lansdale lead a team of commandos on a mission to find and kill a Bigfoot in order to prove its existence to science and protect the public from a future attack.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: Curse of the Druids
programme.desc: Don inspects a new find: ancient 'witches marks' in an English cave. To explore ties to the supernatural, Don visits magical wells and dives the wreck of 'the first Titanic.' He meets modern Druids to see if a bloody battle ended with a deadly curse.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: Curse of the White City
programme.desc: Don ventures into a remote jungle to come face to face with a deadly curse. An ancient civilization once ruled what is now Eastern Honduras from a secret city. Don is uncovering clues about who they were and why such lethal dangers still protect it.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: Devil Swamp
programme.desc: Don investigates dark cults in the Louisiana Bayou. He finds evidence of rituals and joins an exorcism to ward off evil. Don learns from a witch that the land has dark powers. He hunts ghostly orbs said to guard treasure and deadly cryptids.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: Vampire Hunt
programme.desc: In Bulgaria Don uncovers new evidence of vampires. He joins a vampire hunt and looks for clues in a dangerous cave. In Hungary, he meets with a witch who links vampires to witchcraft and visits a jail that held the most famous vampire.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: Temples of Doom
programme.desc: In Peru Don investigates a deadly ancient cult by undergoing their most terrifying ritual. In remote caves, he finds evidence of a supernatural war. Finally, he uncovers clues about bloody sacrifice...and reveals the truth of this dangerous religion.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: Demon Woods
programme.desc: Don visits a Virginia town where paranormal activity is spiking and finds a connection to the lost Roanoke colony. Don retraces the path of a mysterious relic and explores whether dark magic brought to the New World could have doomed the settlers.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: The Nazis' Supernatural Weapons
programme.desc: Don gets access to a mysterious Nazi diary. Its dark clues take him to a perilous cave built to hide treasures and a crypt where Nazis held occult ceremonies. Don joins a witches' ritual to see how Hitler tried to use black magic to conquer the world.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Ruined Peaches
programme.desc: Porsha and Tanya attempt to get all the girls to reconcile. Nene apologizes to Kenya for her hurtful comments. Marlo sends Kenya to her breaking point. On their last day in Greece, Kandi and Cynthia are determined to make up with Nene and Kenya.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: More Love More Problems
programme.desc: After a tumultuous trip to Greece, the women are back home in the ATL. Kandi heads to Chicago for a major acting opportunity, but her absence at home reopens old wounds. Eva debuts her baby to the world while Kenya's marriage hangs in the balance.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Moving Up and Moving On
programme.desc: Kenya takes her separation from Marc one step further, while Cynthia struggles to decide if she should make the big move to Los Angeles. NeNe and Gregg celebrate their 23rd anniversary in a very unconventional way, and Eva moves into her new dream home.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: On the day of Kandi's baby shower, Mama Joyce and Todd's old feud reignites. NeNe gets the scoop on some bad press circulating about her, meanwhile Porsha has newfound issues with Kenya. Kandi's baby shower commences with a 'star is born' theme.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: No Justice, No Peace
programme.desc: Porsha's involvement in the Black Lives Matter movement leads her to Louisville, Kentucky, where she risks everything to demand justice for Breonna Taylor.

programme.title: Below Deck: Jesus Saves
programme.desc: Chris Brown's decision to nap finds him in the crosshairs with Captain Lee. Kate puts her stews through 101 training in order to get them ready for their next charter. The new guests prove to be a handful.

programme.title: Below Deck: Kate Goes to Church
programme.desc: During their night off Jesus and Kate get to know each other while Chris Brown makes a pass at Brianna. Nico deals with the stress of the boat on the 3-month anniversary of the passing of his brother. Matt makes a move on Brianna.

programme.title: Below Deck: Cool Beans
programme.desc: Captain Lee makes a decision regarding the crew's re-configuration which rocks the team to its core. Matt's date with Brianna has an unexpected outcome when they mistakenly arrive at a nude beach. Jen grows weary with the unfair treatment.

programme.title: Below Deck: 100 Feet From Catastrophe
programme.desc: Nico is pushed to his breaking point under the leadership of boson EJ. Matt continues to unravel after his date with Brianna which causes problems for Kate. Captain Lee makes a staffing decision. Jen feels under-appreciated in her department.

programme.title: Below Deck: Blindsided
programme.desc: Leigh Anne Tuohy, the inspiration for Sandra Bullock's character in the Blindside, and her friends prove to be a challenge for Matt's culinary skills. Nico settles into life as the number two on deck, but questions if he has longevity.

programme.title: Below Deck: Under Cover Boss
programme.desc: Nico and Brianna grow closer despite Nico's girlfriend back in Chicago. Unexpected news sends Matt into an alcohol fueled day off. Baker takes the offensive in her friendship with EJ. Kate challenges Jen and Brianna to a stewardess speed test.

programme.title: Below Deck: Hot Mess Express
programme.desc: Captain Lee, Kate, Nico and Matt have their hands full when eight big personalities from Texas come on board. Matt attempts to step up his cooking game. Bruno decides to help the interior, only to discover how unorganized they are.

programme.title: Below Deck: King Come-On-I-Wanna-Lay-Ya
programme.desc: An accident puts Nico in jeopardy of finishing out the rest of the charter season. Kate is forced to leave her stews behind as she attempts to entertain the guests who are none too pleased to be land locked. Without Kate on board, old rivalries resume.

programme.title: Below Deck: Only Doing It for the Money

programme.title: Pacific: The Lost Evidence: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Using cutting-edge techniques, rare archive film, reenactments, and extraordinary interviews with men who were there, we tell, in a totally new way, the story of the Second World War's greatest surprise attack.

programme.title: Wake Island: The Alamo of the Pacific
programme.desc: A true life story of survivors on a desert island during the Pearl Harbor attack of WWII.

programme.title: Pearl Harbor: 24 Hours After

programme.desc: Two treasure hunters retrace the investigations of Nazi relic hunters who searched for the Holy Grail and other lost Templar relics. Their expedition reveals just how close the Nazis came to uncovering ground-breaking Templar secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of Venice
programme.desc: Venice was once a fearsome superpower home to secrets, wealth, and treachery. Today, scientists use pioneering acoustic imaging technology to discover the city's ancient foundations and reveal how it's still standing.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Riddle of the Olmecs
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Mexico, gigantic stone heads carve a hidden path to a Mesoamerican mystery; an intrepid expert follows the trail left by long-ago explorers to turn up new clues and reveal the secrets a lost ancient civilization.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Skeleton of Cannibal Cave
programme.desc: A 10,000-year-old skeleton found deep in a mysterious cave points to dark mysteries from humankind's deep history; using cutting-edge DNA technology, experts investigate the latest evidence to shed new light on these prehistoric secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of Venice
programme.desc: Venice was once a fearsome superpower home to secrets, wealth, and treachery. Today, scientists use pioneering acoustic imaging technology to discover the city's ancient foundations and reveal how it's still standing.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Riddle of the Olmecs
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Mexico, gigantic stone heads carve a hidden path to a Mesoamerican mystery; an intrepid expert follows the trail left by long-ago explorers to turn up new clues and reveal the secrets a lost ancient civilization.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Skeleton of Cannibal Cave
programme.desc: A 10,000-year-old skeleton found deep in a mysterious cave points to dark mysteries from humankind's deep history; using cutting-edge DNA technology, experts investigate the latest evidence to shed new light on these prehistoric secrets.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: The Nazi's Cursed Quest
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters retrace the investigations of Nazi relic hunters who searched for the Holy Grail and other lost Templar relics. Their expedition reveals just how close the Nazis came to uncovering ground-breaking Templar secrets.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Universe's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: A new breed of explorers is risking their careers, and even their lives, to lead humanity to worlds we have never seen. From the beginning of our Solar System to the evolution of the Universe, these heroes are tackling the mysteries of life itself.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Expedition Extraterrestrial
programme.desc: Scientists on the hunt for extraterrestrial life suspect that it might be closer than we think: our very own solar system. Using the latest discoveries, experts might at last confirm that our neighbors might harbor alien life.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Wrath of the Black Hole
programme.desc: New discoveries are changing everything we know about black holes, and using the latest science and technology, experts reveal secrets to the mysterious behind these strange and deadly places.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Cassini's Grand Finale
programme.desc: Go inside the final moments of NASA's Cassini mission, a 20-year project to explore Saturn and its moons. Cassini revealed the secrets of strange new worlds that could harbor alien life, changing everything we know about our Solar System.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of Jupiter
programme.desc: Recent discoveries by NASA's Juno mission reveal new secrets about Jupiter, a strange world that is more like a star than a planet. As scientists uncover what lies beneath its violent storms, our understanding of the solar system could change forever.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secrets of the Seven Earths
programme.desc: The new discovery of seven alien Earth-like planets in a faraway solar system is a major milestone in our hunt for extraterrestrial life, and experts investigate the secrets of TRAPPIST-1's mysterious worlds to reveal if we're truly alone in the universe.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Search for Alien Earths
programme.desc: Astronomers and researchers are on the hunt for the groundbreaking discovery that confirms extraterrestrial life. Using state-of-the-art technology like the Kepler telescope, scientists examine thousands of exoplanets in search of another Earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Dark Origins of the Moon
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that everything we know about our moon could be wrong, and now, investigators are racing to understand the mysteries of its dark and violent past.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Hunt for the Missing Black Holes
programme.desc: New discoveries might finally reveal how supermassive black holes are made, and using the latest technology, experts are on the verge of understanding how these monsters grow and how they affect life on our planet.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of the Juno Mission
programme.desc: NASA's Juno mission is the closest we've ever explored Jupiter, and its incredible images reveal the gas giant's deepest secrets and how this deadly world helped create our solar system.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Time Travel Enigma
programme.desc: Recent discoveries in the cosmos are proving that time travel is less impossible than we think, while the newest discoveries in space and theoretical physics have us on the brink of cracking one of the universe's greatest puzzles.

programme.title: American Monster: Push Record
programme.desc: In Colorado, second-time spouses Harold and Toni Henthorn seem to dote on their young daughter and each other, until their idyllic life is shattered by a deadly hiking accident. Their happy home videos conceal a deadly predator who nearly escaped justice.

programme.title: American Monster: The Last Broadcast
programme.desc: After a taping of their local-access TV show in rural Vermont, Chrissy and Charlie Billis have a terrible accident, smashing their car into a tree. Only one survives. But tapes from the couple's TV show suggest a sinister tale behind what really happened.

programme.title: American Monster: Once a Princess
programme.desc: Hyrah Frasch is no ordinary baby. The photogenic one-year-old already has her own website and looks set to become an internet sensation. But when a tragic accident occurs in the family swimming pool, police discover a brutal killer hiding in her midst.

programme.title: American Monster: Remote Control
programme.desc: When Sherri Dally mysteriously vanishes from her Ventura home, her husband Michael and best friend Debbie head up a massive search. But someone knows more than they're saying. Never-before-aired home videos trace a tale of sordid secrets and double lives.

programme.title: American Monster: Staten Island Love Story
programme.desc: When popular teacher Simeonette Mapes-Crupi is found dead in her Staten Island condo, all evidence points to a brutal robbery gone wrong. But as detectives dig deeper, they uncover a wealth of secrets, lies and sins, that leads to the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: American Monster: Everyone's Favorite Uncle
programme.desc: When wealthy bachelor Steve Clayton meets homely VA nurse Lana Walsh, it's love at first sight. But the devoted couple aren't immune to life's tragedies, and when an untimely death raises questions, an unsettling and devastating secret is revealed.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Murder in Thunderbolt
programme.desc: When a couple is found shot down in front of their home in the quiet suburb of Thunderbolt, the entire community hears the barrage of gunfire. As police sift through the evidence they must determine if one of the neighbors is a witness or the killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Spreadsheet of Terror
programme.desc: When the body of a teenage girl is found in the Columbia River, police wonder if she was the victim of an accident or suicide. But the evidence reveals it was the beginning of disturbing murder mystery.

programme.title: American Monster: Everyone's Favorite Uncle
programme.desc: When wealthy bachelor Steve Clayton meets homely VA nurse Lana Walsh, it's love at first sight. But the devoted couple aren't immune to life's tragedies, and when an untimely death raises questions, an unsettling and devastating secret is revealed.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Murder in Thunderbolt
programme.desc: When a couple is found shot down in front of their home in the quiet suburb of Thunderbolt, the entire community hears the barrage of gunfire. As police sift through the evidence they must determine if one of the neighbors is a witness or the killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: That's Him!
programme.desc: A successful car salesman is killed in a hail of gunfire that erupted on his front porch.

programme.title: American Monster: Remote Control
programme.desc: When Sherri Dally mysteriously vanishes from her Ventura home, her husband Michael and best friend Debbie head up a massive search. But someone knows more than they're saying. Never-before-aired home videos trace a tale of sordid secrets and double lives.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Death and the Maiden
programme.desc: 27-year-old mother Dana Satterfield is found brutally raped and strangled in her South Carolina hair salon. Detectives soon discover they're chasing a dangerous killer who may not be finished.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Murder-in-Law
programme.desc: When Dallas mother Nancy Lyon dies of a mysterious illness in 1991, her wealthy father tells police she was poisoned by her own husband. But the case is far from closed, and the investigation will uncover family secrets with shocking implications.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Deadly Reunion
programme.desc: John Walsh investigates a whirlwind romance and the accusation that Lamont Stephenson strangled his fiancé and her dog. Later, Callahan Walsh explores police claims that Gloria Schulze is a freeloading drunk driver who repeatedly cheats the legal system.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Mother and Child
programme.desc: An unbelievable tragedy ripples through a small community and sends John in pursuit of outlaw Jory Worthen. Callahan takes on the case of fugitive Derrell Demon Brown, an offender with a dark past who committed a violent, personal crime.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Murder in Monrovia
programme.desc: John and investigators follow the trail of a chilling 911 confession that leads them to dangerous Nimrod Guerrero. And when Frederick McCaskill leaves a survivor clinging to life, police and Cal work to make sure this criminal doesn't elude justice.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Hidden Bodies
programme.desc: After struggles in their youth, they are setting out on new paths with new hope but then the unthinkable happens. Their horrific murders are chilling. Find out who would kill them in such a violent way and if they had any idea they were in danger.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Secrets in the Cars
programme.desc: After a night out with friends, 20-year-old Jaleayah Davis is found dead in the midst of a horrifying scene. And 21-year-old Kelsie Schelling, drives two hours to show her boyfriend a sonogram of the baby, but never makes it home.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: She Gave No Warning
programme.desc: When two young women vanish without a trace, investigators are haunted by the things they leave behind - a car with the keys still in the ignition, a pair of shoes and a coat. They disappear with no warning.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Everybody's Daughter
programme.desc: When Kate Johnson is murdered in her dorm room, detectives are stumped why this innocent young woman was targeted. After taking 400 DNA samples and establishing a secret task force, detectives track down Kate's killer and get their chilling answer.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Deadly Decision
programme.desc: After beautiful and brilliant Tiffany Jenks is killed in Fairview Oregon, an investigation uncovers multiple suspects, including Tiffany's ex-boyfriend and three strangers who meet her at a bar and reveals a twisted and mysterious motive for murder.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Once an Animal
programme.desc: A cold case from Northern California heats up when Detective Molly Daul ties a brutal assault case she's working on to this twelve year old murder. And when this killer strikes in Portland, multiple homicide detectives team up to take him down.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Control Alt Delete
programme.desc: Maribel Ramos is a US army veteran with a complicated love life. When she arranges to meet an online date, she disappears, leaving family and friends desperate for news. Detectives are left to uncover a twisted tale of jealousy and rage.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.desc: While restoring the home's exterior and working on the porch, Trent and his crew experience an unexpected setback.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Bedrooms, Bats, and Beadboard
programme.desc: An unwanted visitor appears while Trent is gathering precious beadboard from the ceiling of the abandoned home. He must also figure out how to turn an old dining room into a new mudroom, laundry room, and bathroom.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Raising the Roof for Room
programme.desc: Trent opens up the roof of the cottage in order to add more square footage for a master bathroom. In the master bathroom, he adds signature touches including an antique vanity and a unique accent to the floor.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Making a Grand Entrance
programme.desc: Trent tackles the front entrance and common room in a home that hasn't been lived in for over 50 years. Trent wrestles with the front door's historic hardware and attempts to expose a 100-year-old fireplace.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Sweet Master Suite
programme.desc: Trent begins renovating an old bedroom into a full master suite. He adds a beautiful, functional bathroom and a massive walk-in closet. Trent must also determine what to do with a historic fireplace that's in ruins.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Daggett Camp
programme.desc: Chase and team take on the Daggett Camp, which was owned by a famous Maine politician whose family wants to rehab it in only six weeks. A hidden surprise underneath the cabin threatens to derail the whole project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Desert Pond Hideaway
programme.desc: Chase and the team travel to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their forgotten shack into a relaxing retreat. The couple have big ambitions leaving the crew stretching a $30,000 budget in only four weeks.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Alaska
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide feast brings him to Alaska, where he cracks into crab legs fit for a king at Slippery Salmon Bar and Grill in Anchorage. In Talkeetna, he samples the local wild game, ordering a slab of reindeer meatloaf at Denali BrewPub.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sensational Seafood
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sizzling Southwest
programme.desc: Enchiladas, burritos, fajitas, ole! We're counting them down one by one, culminating in a Tex Mex Treat so stupendous, it's coming in at number one on the countdown.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Festival Of Fries
programme.desc: Everyone's favorite side dish takes center stage as Noah Cappe celebrates over-the-top fries loaded with every topping you could imagine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Munchies On The Go
programme.desc: The fairground wasn't made for forks and knives, so Noah Cappe is checking out the hand-held carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 'Tis the Season
programme.desc: Why save your holiday favorites for the holidays, when you can enjoy them year-round at the fair! Some of your favorite holiday dishes get the carnival eats treatment.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Citizen Candy Cane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Greater Baton Rouge State Fair for a helping of Cajun treats, like the Cajun Boudin Taco and Pecan Pie Pop. Then he's off to bask in the lights -- and eats -- of the Aurora Winter Festival in Toronto, Canada.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Southern Treats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe samples Southern hospitality on fairgrounds across the county. The carnival treats he finds are all infused with a down-home goodness that makes each bite taste like Southern sugar and spice.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bayou Bites
programme.desc: Down in Texas and Louisiana, the bayou fairgrounds are full of rich and tasty food.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Crazy for Crunch
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson takes a deep dive into some deep-fried dishes that are sure to satisfy the craving for crunch. These creations have crunchy coatings so crispy that you have to see it to believe it.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Holiday Delights
programme.desc: Nothing says 'Happy Holidays' like having all your favourite festive foods in one place. Brad Miller finds the Yuletide spirit with his favorite holiday steak from Harry's Savoy Grill in Wilmington, Del.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: It's More Southern That Way
programme.desc: It's all deeply flavored fun as NASCAR personality Rutledge Wood and Damaris Phillips head to Georgia's own Savannah Seafood Shack for fried oysters dished up in a waffle cone and some homemade ice cream chilled to perfection.

programme.title: The Bobby and Damaris Show: Taste of Home
programme.desc: Cozy up in Chef Bobby Flay's kitchen as he and Damaris Phillips talk about comfort food and make feel-good favourites with one of their favourite people: Ina Garten. Bobby makes a red chile glazes meatloaf and Ina makes parmesan mashed potatoes.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Waffles Gone Wild
programme.desc: Ordinary waffles be warned: Chef Bobby Flay has your number! Bobby wows with a menu of unexpected waffle creations like Cornbread Waffles with Ranch Style Eggs & Cilantro Crema and Glazed Waffle Donuts!

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Wake Up Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby's coffee-inspired creations include Scrambled Eggs with Sweet Potato Biscuits, Ham Steak & Red Eye Gravy, and Espresso-Chocolate Chip Banana Bread with Espresso.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bread Lovers' Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay takes an essential element of brunch, bread, and makes it the star of every dish on his inventive menu from croque Madame bread pudding with herb-crusted tomatoes to a simple pull-apart cinnamon bread and a gazpacho bloody Maria.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue Boss of All Sandwiches
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a meaty stacked sandwich and a beefy ballpark dog. In Oklahoma City, a gas station-turned-burger joint serves a fried apple and brie cheeseburger to fuel the soul.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked, Stuffed and Smothered
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon devours a delicious dumpling-inspired pork and shrimp burger and an elevated pub food classic. In Shreveport, La., a wood-fired pizza is topped with spicy roast chicken and sweet corn.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Whole Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Michael Symon's in Nashville, where a killer new burger joint encourages you to construct your own custom creations. Then, he hits the heart of Cleveland where a newcomer pushes the boundaries of pub food and house-made brews.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Finger-Licking Good
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli joins Michael Symon at one of his favorite Manhattan spots, where they combine a bottomless beer selection with the most high-octane hot dog known to man.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lands at the LA County Fair in Pomona, Calif. for some sunny west coast eats, like the jackfruit torta, PB meatballs and cherry candy-coated cherry punch hot wings. Finally, Noah takes a tasty stroll through the rainbow Ice Cream Garden.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 50 Shades of Crepe
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Vancouver to sample some amazing eats, like the truly Canadian poutine stuffed burger, shrimp fried rice Balls, jerk chicken dumplings, and the Donuccino, a meal and a milkshake all in one.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Piefidelity
programme.desc: Noah Cappe knows where to find amazing fresh seafood at the Delaware State Fair in Harrington.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Good, the Bacon, the Ugly
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads for the Lone Star state to eat his way through the Texas State Fair in Dallas, featuring some inventive foods like the bacon-tilla and the indulgent masterpiece of chicken fried lobster.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pepper Popper Party
programme.desc: Noah Cappe challenges carnival concessionaires across America to feature everyone's favorite spicy bar snack in their offerings. From hot dogs and burgers to pizza and onion rings, even a dessert, these pepper popper creations are on fire.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Carnival Classics Gone Wild
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe crosses the country in search of carnival classics gone wild! From a pumped-up corndog at the Porter County Fair to an out of this world funnel cake-blooming onion mashup at the Greater Gulf State Fair.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sacramento, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb swings into Sacramento, California, for three gold-standard meals from the Golden State, including a perfectly fried Chinese-American chicken, a savory multi-meat waffle stack.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: JFK Declassified: Tracking Oswald: The Russian Network

programme.title: Nazis: Ultimate Evil

programme.desc: When Tasha and Davenport go on a vacation, Leo must make sure that nothing happens to his stepdad's prized possessions.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Concert in a Can
programme.desc: The Lab Rats befriend a new kid in school named Marcus, who takes to the whole gang very quickly, except for Leo.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Chip Switch
programme.desc: Adam, Bree and Chase defy warnings from Davenport and swap bionic chips with bad results.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Stump Day/ Holiday Spellicial
programme.desc: Marco tries to throw Star a surprise party. Eclipsa's dark spells invited to office holiday party.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: When Worlds Collide/ Road to Danville
programme.desc: Discovering that a strange planet is hurtling directly towards Danville, Phineas and Ferb set out to avert a disaster, while Buford looks forward to making contact with its alien race. Dr. Doofenshirmtz hopes to steal the world's largest ball of twine.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Diplomat's Club

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Understudy
programme.desc: George and Jerry are accused of injuring Bette Midler during their softball game.

programme.title: Mom: Pudding and a Screen Door

programme.title: Mom: Charlotte Bronte and a Backhoe
programme.desc: Bonnie locks horns with Jill's 'inner strength' coach, Miranda. Also, Christy struggles to bounce back after being rejected from law school.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Coming Out Party

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Basketball Jones

programme.title: Major Crimes: Turn Down

programme.title: Monk: Mr. Monk Goes to a Fashion Show

programme.title: Judge Jerry

programme.title: Judge Mathis

programme.title: Maury: DNA Truth ... This 27-Year-Old Is Too White to Be My Son
programme.desc: Matt wants to find out if a man named Lloyd is his biological father. Matt says that Lloyd abandoned his mother and has denied him since the day he was born.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Bros Come to Blows
programme.desc: Chad is here to propose to his girlfriend, but is about to find out she cheated with his best friend. Andrew knew Amber cheated while he was in Iraq, but didn't know it was with her sister's boyfriend. Bud wants to know why Keisha has been lying.
